messages.subject: [R-sig-DB] Rdbi
messages.body_plain:
I've had some requests for my Rdbi packages, so I've uploaded them to 
CRAN.  The source is also in CVS at http://rdbi.sourceforge.net/.

Cheers,
Tim

-- 
Timothy H. Keitt
Department of Ecology and Evolution
State University of New York at Stony Brook
Stony Brook, New York 11794 USA
Phone: 631-632-1101, FAX: 631-632-7626
http://life.bio.sunysb.edu/ee/keitt/
